improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-gideon-preview.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by summarizing the core value prop and pricing. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical for B2B audiences who often discover tools through social shares. Including the free trial mention and entry price reduces friction and sets expectations before the click.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant), who it's for (trade and business professionals), and the key benefits (instant answers, voice chat, professional support). The subheading includes a clear, low-commitment CTA by highlighting the free trial offer, reducing friction for first-time visitors. The language is direct and confident without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue accessing Gideon. Plans start at just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. Your membership unlocks unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace for all your trade and business needs.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value included, it reduces uncertainty and builds trust, helping visitors feel confident about becoming members.
